award_name.description: Name of the Modern Award monitored

check_date.description: ISO date when the check was run

source_url.description: FWO or Fair Work Commission URL checked

change_detected.description: Whether a new variation or update was found

change_summary.description: Plain English summary of what changed

pr_number.description: Fair Work Commission PR/decision number if applicable

impact_assessment.description: How this change may affect the user's pay structure

urgency.description: How urgently the user should act

raw_findings.description: Raw scraped or fetched content for audit trail
